name: Week 7 Push — Form Check (Chest/Shoulders/Triceps)
description: Form Check Week. Same exercises, same or slightly lower weights. Stop every set when form breaks — don't chase reps. Pec deck is broken, swapping to kinesis cable fly (first time). Push press cue: parallel feet, no stagger.

exercises.notes: Shoulder rehab — Yuri band warmup. Keep in every push session.
45/side. W7D1: 45x8x3 with parallel feet — way cleaner than 50. Stay at 45 for form check. Last 2 reps of set 3 started to collapse — stop there if form breaks. No stagger, no momentum hacks.
20lb. W7D1: right shoulder crackly but improved each set with warmup. Stay at 20x15. Watch the shoulder — injury prevention is paramount.
180. W7D1: 180x8x3 clean then died on 4th. Confirmed working weight at station 2. Full ROM, controlled eccentric.
50lb. W7D1: dropped from 55 to 50 for pause at bottom — 4x10 all completed with better ROM. 50 with pause > 55 without. Last set mega struggle but locked it out.
Working number: 8. W7D1: 6 too easy, 9 losing form, 8x11 felt most like pec deck. Feels like DB fly with constant tension — less support than pec deck. Stay at 8.
45. W7D1: dropped from 50 to 45 for stability. Both sides crackly at 50. 45 feels more controlled. Stay here.
54x12x3. W7D1: surprisingly strong, can feel all the fibers. Steady and safe. Love these.
110. W6: 10/10/9. Stay at 110, form focus. Straight arms, lats do the work, stop when shoulders start taking over.

tips: FORM CHECK WEEK: Stop every set when form breaks. If you only get 6 clean reps, that's the set. Don't grind ugly reps to hit a number.
Push press: parallel feet, no stagger. Shallow dip, big drive, full lockout. This is the cue to drill this week.
Kinesis cable fly is new — treat the first session as exploration. Find the working number, learn the movement path.
Weights stay flat or dip. The goal is perfect reps, not PRs. PRs come from form weeks.
Shoulder rehab stays in the warmup — band pull-aparts + kneeling cross-body external rotations every push day.
Rest 2 min between push press, 2.5 min on chest press, 75s on cables
